check_value.value: $Phase2ObjectiveStarted and not @$Phase2DefendersCleared and not @$Phase2Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded and ($Phase2RemainingDefenders le 0 or $Phase2RadarDefenders.count == 0)
$Phase2ObjectiveStarted and not @$Phase2DefendersCleared and not @$Phase2Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded
$Phase3ObjectiveStarted and not @$Phase3DefendersCleared and not @$Phase3Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded and $Phase3RemainingDefenders le 0
$Phase3ObjectiveStarted and not @$Phase3DefendersCleared and not @$Phase3Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded

do_if.value: $Phase4DefenceStarted and not @$Phase4Wave1Spawned and not @$Phase4Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded
$Phase4DefenceStarted and not @$Phase4Wave2Spawned and not @$Phase4Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded
$Phase4DefenceStarted and not @$Phase4Wave3Spawned and not @$Phase4Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded

add_blueprints.wares: [ware.ship_bor_m_corvette_01_a, ware.ship_bor_m_gunboat_01_a, ware.ship_ter_m_frigate_01_a, ware.ship_ter_m_corvette_01_a, ware.ship_atf_l_destroyer_01_a, ware.ship_bor_l_destroyer_01_a, ware.ship_bor_m_trans_container_01_a]

[ware.weapon_gen_m_plasma_01_mk2, ware.weapon_ter_m_laser_01_mk2, ware.weapon_ter_l_destroyer_01_mk1, ware.weapon_bor_l_beam_01_mk1, ware.turret_arg_m_flak_01_mk1, ware.turret_arg_m_flak_02_mk1, ware.turret_arg_m_plasma_01_mk1, ware.turret_arg_m_plasma_02_mk1, ware.turret_arg_l_plasma_01_mk1, ware.turret_bor_l_disruptor_01_mk1, ware.turret_bor_l_flak_01_mk1, ware.turret_bor_m_arc_01_mk1, ware.turret_bor_m_arc_02_mk1, ware.turret_bor_m_laser_01_mk1, ware.turret_bor_m_laser_02_mk1, ware.shield_ter_m_standard_01_mk1, ware.shield_ter_l_standard_01_mk3, ware.shield_ter_m_standard_01_mk3, ware.shield_bor_m_standard_01_mk1, ware.shield_bor_m_standard_02_mk1, ware.shield_bor_l_standard_01_mk3, ware.shield_bor_m_standard_01_mk3, ware.shield_bor_m_standard_02_mk3, ware.thruster_gen_m_combat_01_mk3, ware.thruster_gen_l_allround_01_mk3, ware.engine_arg_m_combat_01_mk3, ware.engine_bor_l_travel_01_mk1, ware.engine_ter_l_travel_01_mk1, ware.ship_gen_s_fightingdrone_01_a, ware.ship_gen_xs_repairdrone_01_a, ware.ship_gen_xs_cargodrone_empty_01_a]

check_value.value: $Phase6Started and not @$ScenarioEnded and $XenonShipyard.exists and $ForwardBase.exists and $Phase6NextShipyardWaveTime gt 0 and player.age ge $Phase6NextShipyardWaveTime
$Phase6Started and not @$ScenarioEnded and $XenonWharf.exists and $ForwardBase.exists and $Phase6NextWharfWaveTime gt 0 and player.age ge $Phase6NextWharfWaveTime
$Phase6Started and $Phase6FirstSolarDestroyed and not $Phase6SecondSolarDestroyed and $Phase6SolarADestroyed and $Phase6SolarBDestroyed and not @$ScenarioEnded

do_if.value: $Phase6Started and $Phase6SecondSolarDeadlineStarted and not $Phase6SecondSolarDestroyed and not ($Phase6SolarADestroyed and $Phase6SolarBDestroyed) and not @$Phase6Completed and not @$ScenarioEnded and $Phase6RemainingSolar.exists
